notes: CodificationSection, , , , which required the President to submit to appropriate committees of Congress an annual report on the extent of espionage activities against the United States and other member countries of the North Atlantic Treaty Organization by operatives of the government of any East European country that was receiving assistance under this chapter, terminated, effective , pursuant to , as amended, set out as a note under , Money and Finance.
